children.text: Funding for the DOL Office of Inspector General for oversight of unemployment provisions

There are appropriated, out of moneys in the Treasury not otherwise appropriated, to the Office of the Inspector General of the Department of Labor, $25,000,000 to carry out audits, investigations, and other oversight activities authorized under the Inspector General Act of 1978 (5 U.S.C. App.)

children.tail: See References in Text note below.
that are related to the provisions of, and amendments made by, this subtitle, to remain available without fiscal year limitation.
